title: Once close enough for an acquisition, Stripe and Airwallex are now going after each other
summary: Stripe and Airwallex, once serving different geographies and customer segments, are now directly competing as their business territories overlap. This shift signals intensifying competition in the global fintech payments market.
content: For most of its life, Airwallex and Stripe have mostly operated in different geographies, selling to different buyers. That's changing.

zh.title: 曾接近被对方收购，Stripe和Airwallex现在却在竞争
zh.summary: Stripe和Airwallex曾经服务于不同的地区和客户群体，现在随着业务领地重叠，两者正在直接竞争。这一转变表明全球金融科技支付市场竞争日益加剧。
